lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::when a spec lists every variant of a component as requiring the same visual treatment border shadow hover active physics verify each variant individually a shared base class for the border is not enough per variant shadow and interaction physics must be asserted per variant
lessons.text: When a spec lists every variant of a component as requiring the same visual treatment (border + shadow + hover/active physics), verify each variant individually — a shared base class for the border is not enough; per-variant shadow and interaction physics must be asserted per variant.
